name: オールドフィルム開始
オールドフィルム終了

parameters: D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Use the SHIFT key on your keyboard to run
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]or click your destination with the LMB!
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Run can be set as the default in the Options menu!
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]You can skip through dialogue with the CTRL key
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]You can hide the text box with the TAB key
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Smack them with strong weapons for tons of damage!
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]You have special skills you can use! 24
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]They're really strong, so use them often!
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]TP can rise to 100 during battle!
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Don't hold back! Use it all!
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Enemies have appeared at the festival! 24
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]If they spot you, they'll run at you!
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]And if they touch you, a battle will start!
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Enemies can't see behind themselves or through cover! 19
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]You can use that to hide from them!
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]If you don't want to fight, be sneaky!
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]You can save from the Menu screen! 24
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]You can also save from Restore Points!
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]so use them to help grind out those levels!
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Find the Restore Point at every location!
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]When you do something amazing, you get an achievement! 19
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]You can check your achievements in the Collection!
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]to alternate between the two modes.
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Bad End Mode is now unlocked. 19
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]An option will appear when you fall in battle.
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]your skills, items and equipment will be confiscated,
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]and the only way out is to lose.
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]There's no winning in Bad End Mode...
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Interact with an enemy from behind 19
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]and you'll enter battle with an advantage.
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Your advantage is based on chance: 19
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Back Attack - Enemies are confused for one turn. 19
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Back Attack+ - Enemies can't move for one to two turns.
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Back Attack Slash - All enemies are insta-killed (very low chance).
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Books are items that provide experience. 19
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Use them on party members you want to level up.
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Select them from the Items menu.
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]They're a guaranteed drop from bosses.
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]They can also sometimes be found on bookshelves.
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]You can exchange books for full-recovery items. 19
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Books are rare, so think carefully before burning them.
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Ten Books can be exchanged for one Healing Mist.
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Four High Books can be exchanged for one Healing Mist.
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Two Mega Books can be exchanged for one Healing Mist.
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Healing Mists restore 2,500 HP to the party.
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Skills like Slave Knight's Shield can protect party members. 19
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Use them when your teammates are in a pinch!
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Takes all damage meant for other party members.
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Receives attacks based on number of people.
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]If the enemy's a slave, there's a high chance they'll withdraw.
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]It has no effect on non-slave enemies.
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]These dungeons are unlocked by conquering enemy nations. 19
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]The higher the difficulty, the stronger the enemies.
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]If you get stuck, try leveling up for a bit.
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Enemies are strong, and there are traps.
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Not required to clear the game.
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Diana gains new skills not just from leveling up, 19
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]but also from acquiring certain weapons.
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Her gun skills are strong but require ammo.
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Ammo drops from enemies and treasure chests.
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]You now have five or more party members. 19
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Select four members to fight in battles.
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]You can swap out members during battle.
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Select your team based on the enemy you're facing.
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Those who don't participate will also receive XP.
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]The hot spring in Bohelos's Estate is done! 19
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Go there for an invigorating experience!
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Head inside, kick back, and enjoy the hot water!
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]All party members will receive the Hot Spring status!
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Hot Spring restores 5% of your maximum TP each turn!
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Run until you shake off your pursuer!
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Party members' stats will be lowered due to panic!
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Search the Underground Temple and find a way out!
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Use the Poem of Flowers item to change forms!
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Magic skills are no longer available!
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Certain stats are increased! (Max HP, Accuracy, Evasion, Speed)
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Poem of Flowers can also be used during battle!
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Lily Killer has officially joined the fight! 19
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Her level's been reset but will rise again at an accelerated rate!
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Crystal skills are powerful skills that weaken enemies!
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Conquer it to destroy the Bad End!
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Once you clear the dungeon, Bad End Mode will be no more!
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]You can load your latest save 19
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]or select continue to initiate it! 19
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Carries over levels and all equipment!
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]A doll being sold at the market in Bohelos.
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]There's something strange about its eyes. 19
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]You may find out more in the future.
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]You can halt your world conquest and surrender to the Empire. 19
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]This is for people who are tired of resisting. 19
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]You'll go straight to Bad End Mode.
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]The most difficult dungeon in Demons Roots. 19
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Prepare well before you attempt it. 19
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]You can keep attempting it until you clear it!
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Collect gear across your playthroughs to help you!
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Level up over multiple playthroughs to make things easier!
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Use the Orb of Light to return to the main game!
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]I'll explain the timer on the results screen. 19
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]The timer starts when Deathpolca appears
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]and stops once Bless Curse is defeated.
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]The time's displayed on the playthrough's results screen!
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]The time's also displayed for your total playthroughs!
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]You can get several during a single playthrough.
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]The effects are carried over into New Game+.
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Get it to max value and you'll be unstoppable!
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]You can skip the cut-ins for ultimate skills! 19
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Go to Options -> Ultimate Skill Skip -> \C[10]ON\C[0]
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]You can also click during the cut-in to skip.
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Certain event cut-ins can't be skipped.
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Slave Knight Ange joins the party! 35
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Magic Unit Sarasa joins the party! 35
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]FBI Agent Diana joins the party! 35
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Imperial Prince Najezta joins the party! 35
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Millennium Princess Lily Killer joins the party! 35
D_TEXT \oc[black]\f[i]Remnant Mebius is back in action! 35

name: 奥義イージスストーム
奥義プリズムトリズム

parameters: //ももまるバトル用コマンド
//ももまるバトル用コマンド

name: 奥義帝国式十進剣まじめ

parameters: //ももまるバトル用コマンド
The southern countries have announced they'll be abolishing slavery.
Any attacks on slaves are now subject to punishment.
We're anticipating massive migration between the north and the
south of the continent. Be on alert for future announcements.
Demon sightings within imperial territory are on the rise.
The Empire will announce their response in the near future.
Many speculate demons are involved in the recurring disappearances
of daughters of royal families in neighboring countries.
If true, the abductions may continue and humanity may face steep
demands for the safe return of the hostages.
A meeting of experts is being held regarding the increasing number
of people falling victim to the Devil's Drug.
Each country is urged to take steps to combat this difficult-to-treat
An incredibly large blast was fired from the Radiant Tower, which is
under joint control with the Neutral Republic of Kumin.
The Empire insists it bears no responsibility for this incident and
has pledged to question Kumin on its involvement.
There are increasing calls from many countries to have the tower
dismantled, and Kumin's government must soon make a decision.
Yet another slaughter has occurred in Bohelos, demonkind's somber
stronghold. The world mourns for the dead.
Too many have died in the three years since the demons appeared.
Many call for the reorganization of the Human Liberation Army.
A swarm of Ultra Beasts appeared from the southeast, causing severe
The demons are suspected to have a hand in it, and the Empire's
announced it will be conducting a rigorous investigation.
Months have passed since the Human Liberation Army failed to fell
the demons. Mass confusion and the stockpiling of arms continues.
It seems many who fought in the Human Liberation Army have been
brainwashed by demons and are being used to commit violence.
The Kingdom of Tolkia has announced plans to cooperate with the
demons, causing widespread confusion throughout the world.
People are urged to remain vigilant, as the demons will have access
to Tolkia's large number of dragons.
The Saint Coliseum has been held in Plana. The slaves emerged
victorious, and control of the country has been handed over.
Many are pointing out the demons' involvement in their victory.
It seems the slaves colluded with them to defeat their opponents.
A massacre has occurred in the Kingdom of Bohelos. We're once
again reminded that there's no limit to the demons' brutality.
Memorials are being held in churches around the world. People are
calling for the knights to take swift action.
Bohelos is under the control of the demons. There are widespread
The sudden appearance of an unknown power continues to sow
confusion as ambassadors meet to discuss the demonic threat.
The serial killer Lily Killer appeared in Plana, and the corpse of yet
another brutally murdered woman was discovered.
A person believed to be Lily Killer has been arrested in Plana.
She'll be held outside the country to prevent mass panic.
The successor to the throne has been announced! The 92nd prince,
Dorbeja, will be the next emperor!

name: 古い砦時間制限コモン

parameters: CSS_カスタム画像変更 アクター 10 0 menu_dai3 -1 -1 -1 -1 -1
While she slept, Deathpolca was beaten awake and raped in front of
a magic device by five prison guards.
Each time the drowsiness won out and she was about to fall
asleep, she was forced awake by spanking or by being made
to give a blowjob that cut off her breathing.
By the time she was finally released, her entire body ached
and she couldn't sleep well due to the residual arousal from
ＢＡＤＥＮＤ体験版はここまでとなります。
ＢＡＤＥＮＤモードは話の中でたびたび噂される闇の施設に
主人公達が堕ちてしまうというＩＦを描いたものです。
ハード凌辱系は苦手な人も多いので、
未プレイでも本編攻略可能、実績はなしという形で
住み分けを行う予定です。（その分、自由にやります）
今後も制作を少しずつ進め、
本編やＢＡＤＥＮＤに登場するヒロイン達も
順に公開していきますので、続報をお待ちください。
体験版を遊んで頂き、誠にありがとうございました！
ここからは冒頭のループとなります。
※仲間が増えたらスイッチ条件で追加していく。
Begin Bad End Mode. Meet a tragic end inside the Prison of
Warning in the Empire's internment camp. There is no escape.

name: ーーーイベントーーー

parameters: \{The Demon King had a bunch of minions
\{but your grandmas and grandpas, and their
\{One day, a sneaky demon attacked a girl
while she was using the bathroom.
\{She mustered all her courage and threw her
\{The demon fell to pieces, crying as it died.
\#Until the day when the humans defeated the Demon Lord...
Having lost their leader and their territory, the demons fled time
and again to avoid their human pursuers.
Orcs, minotaurs, vampires, demon dragons... Countless races were
completely annihilated. Even the once-feared Apostles dwindled to
Just as they'd given up and were on the verge of destruction,
pitch black darkness suddenly spread out before them. The demons
leapt into that darkness, desperately clinging to their lives...
What they found was a place where all life had come to an end.
A land of death and darkness... The Dark Realm.
They survived in the Dark Realm for hundreds of years,
forced to confront their own longevity.
There wasn't a day that went by without them dreaming.
They dreamed of that bright world, teeming with life.
That was where they wanted to be.
At one point, ten young demons were born in the Dark Realm.
Seeking coexistence with humanity, they set out for that bright
world. It began with a young girl, their first contact with mankind.
At first she showed innocent curiosity, but when she learned they
were demons, she grew afraid and began to cry. The young demon
froze up, uncertain how to proceed.
"Did I do something wrong? Is she afraid because I look different?
Did the flower I gave her as a sign of friendship offend her?"
Still determined to prove he meant well, the demon approached the
A "White Phantom" appeared without warning and killed the
There was no place for demons in that bright world. They were
resented by all mankind, and there was an unstoppable force
Thus, they continued living as they had, surrounded by darkness
and gnawing at the dirt to sate their hunger. Unable to do aught
but gaze up at that dark sky...
That was how we'd die. Any new life would slowly rot away in the
darkness. Was this our punishment for our past sins?
As the years passed, demons gave up on even lamenting their fates.
The Dark Realm itself began to collapse...
Their end had finally come. All that was left was to await extinction.
\#Struggle to survive in a world that wouldn't accept them!
\#Carve out a place to call home with their own two hands!
\#No matter what future might await them...
Spend a Spirit Stone to play the gacha. There's also a chance
Spend a Spirit Soul Stone to get a guaranteed SSR pull.
Spirit Soul Stones are rare, so be careful.★
